_description: Maps each OMS skill name to its source third-party repository and the path within that repo where relevant files live.

K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills.description: Claude scientific skills collection with SKILL.md, references/, scripts/, and assets/ per skill

biostatistics-analyzer.notes: Statistical analysis skill covers biostatistics methods (survival analysis, logistic regression, ROC curves, sample size calcs)

clinical-treatment-plan-generator.notes: Treatment plan generation skill with LaTeX templates and validation scripts

genomics-variant-interpreter.notes: ClinVar database skill for genomic variant interpretation with clinical significance references

medical-imaging-analysis.notes: Imaging Data Commons skill for medical imaging analysis via BigQuery, DICOM, and cloud storage

precision-medicine-therapeutics.notes: Clinical decision support with biomarker classification, treatment recommendations, cohort analysis

systematic-review-assistant.notes: Literature review skill for systematic review workflows

surgical-procedure-planner.notes: Clinical reports skill with surgical/operative templates, discharge summaries, H&P templates

huifer/Claude-Ally-Health.description: Claude health assistant with skills in .claude/skills/ and commands in .claude/commands/

clinical-differential-diagnosis.notes: Symptom analysis command + AI analyzer skill for differential diagnosis workflows

drug-interaction-checker.notes: Drug interaction command + polypharmacy check + food-database skill for interaction analysis

lab-result-interpreter.notes: Health trend analyzer skill with data sources, algorithms, templates for lab result interpretation

medication-administration-safety.notes: Medication safety commands covering administration, polypharmacy, and allergy cross-referencing

radiation-exposure-tracker.notes: Radiation exposure tracking with both the guidance command and data reference command

Augmented-Nature/ClinicalTrials-MCP-Serv.description: MCP server for ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 access (TypeScript)

clinical-trials-search.notes: Entire repo is a single MCP server — copy src/, README.md, package.json, tsconfig.json

Augmented-Nature/OpenFDA-MCP-Server.description: MCP server for OpenFDA API (TypeScript, drug + device handlers)

fda-drug-information.notes: Entire repo — src/ has handlers (drug, device), types, utils, plus README.md, package.json, tsconfig.json

Augmented-Nature/PubMed-MCP-Server.description: MCP server for PubMed/PMC E-utilities API (TypeScript)

pubmed-literature-search.notes: Entire repo — src/ has api/ (eutils, pmc, utils), types, plus README.md, package.json, tsconfig.json

Augmented-Nature/AlphaFold-MCP-Server.description: MCP server for AlphaFold protein structure database (TypeScript)

protein-structure-analysis.notes: Entire repo — src/index.ts, README.md, package.json, tsconfig.json

Cicatriiz/healthcare-mcp-public.description: Multi-tool healthcare MCP server (Node.js) with individual tool files in server/

clinical-guideline-navigator.notes: Health topics + NCBI bookshelf tools provide clinical guideline navigation

icd10-code-lookup.notes: Medical terminology tool covers ICD-10 code lookup and medical term resolution

dicom-metadata-extractor.notes: DICOM tool for metadata extraction from medical imaging files

emergency-triage-protocols.notes: Medical calculator tool handles triage scoring and clinical calculations

evidence-synthesis-ai.notes: PubMed + MedRxiv tools for evidence synthesis from literature

pediatric-growth-charts.notes: Medical calculator tool includes pediatric growth/BMI calculations, FDA tool for pediatric drug info

openpharma-org/drugbank-mcp-server.description: DrugBank MCP server with SQLite backend (Node.js)

drugbank-search.notes: Entire repo — src/ (drugbank-api, parser-sqlite, index), scripts/ (build-db, download-db), README.md, package.json

openpharma-org/medicare-mcp.description: Medicare drug pricing and formulary MCP server (TypeScript)

medicare-drug-stats.notes: Entire repo — src/ (index.ts, types.ts), data/ (asp, formulary), README.md, package.json, tsconfig.json. Note: data/ contains .csv.gz and .txt.gz files

JamesANZ/medical-mcp.description: Medical MCP server for WHO Global Health Observatory (TypeScript)

epidemiology-surveillance.notes: Entire repo — src/ (index.ts, types.ts, utils.ts, cache/), scripts/, README.md, package.json, tsconfig.json

wso2/fhir-mcp-server.description: FHIR MCP server with SMART-on-FHIR auth (Python)

fhir-data-access.notes: Entire repo — src/fhir_mcp_server/ (server.py, utils.py, oauth/), README.md, pyproject.toml, requirements.txt, server.json

JohnSnowLabs/spark-nlp-workshop.description: Spark NLP workshop with Healthcare NLP notebooks and examples

hipaa-compliance-checker.notes: Healthcare NLP module with de-identification, assertion detection, and entity recognition notebooks. Very large repo — only copy README.md and select relevant notebooks (DeIdentification.ipynb, etc.)

AminAlam/meddev-agent-skills.description: Medical device agent skills organized by category (regulatory, firmware, architecture, etc.)

iec-62304-compliance.notes: IEC 62304 compliance skill under regulatory/ category, with SKILL.md

medikode-ai/mcp-server.description: Medikode MCP server for medical coding (Node.js, multi-service)

cpt-coding-assistant.notes: Entire repo — src/ (services, routes, database, middleware, utils), README.md, package.json. Shared server for CPT and RAF

raf-score-calculator.notes: Same repo as cpt-coding-assistant — shared MCP server handles both CPT coding and RAF score calculations

matsuikentaro1/humanizer_academic.description: Claude skill for humanizing academic/medical writing (SKILL.md only)

medical-paper-humanizer.notes: Minimal repo with SKILL.md, README.md, and LICENSE

AI-Agent-Grandmaster/truthstack-mcp.description: TruthStack MCP server for supplement-drug interaction checking (Node.js)

supplement-drug-interactions.notes: Entire repo — server.js, server.json, README.md, package.json. Note: audit listed as TruthStack1/truthstack-mcp but actual repo is AI-Agent-Grandmaster/truthstack-mcp

anthropics/healthcare.description: Anthropic healthcare skills collection with skills and plugins

prior-authorization-review.notes: Prior authorization review skill with SKILL.md, references/, assets/ (includes sample PDF documents)
